name: pr-source contract validator accepts each of the seven canonical source_class enum values
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && for cls in federal-financial-regulator fedramp-high federal-digital-services federal-infrastructure financial-industry financial-industry-consortium gold-standard-process; do printf "sources:\n  - {id: $cls, name: x, github: x/y, tier: 1, source_class: $cls, applies_to: [node], fetch_frequency: daily}\n" > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>err.txt > /dev/null || { echo "FAIL: $cls" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo ok 1>&2
